Popular confidence pass 2026-06-02 J: direct official, bathing-profile, or dedicated local beach sources support the recorded static identity, access, terrain, and service context for this record. sourceNotes: Phase 2 final global organized-service cleanup 2026-05-26: downgraded unsupported organized-service claim because no direct source URL is recorded; kept nearby food/parking notes only.

Source follow-up pass 19 2026-05-27: direct AllOverGreece beach page supports Avra beach identity/location in Aegina town only. Confidence, coordinates, access, services, amenities, wind profile, and scoring were not changed.

Next popular-area confidence pass 2026-06-02: WeLoveAegina and AllOverGreece directly support Avra as the closest beach to Aegina port, in front of Kolona, with sand/pebbles, very easy access, organized status, nearby taverns/tsipouradika, playground, and basic facilities. Water depth was changed to medium because the reviewed sources do not document a shallow-water claim. No windProfile, scoring, photos, or live calm/protected/safe claim was changed.

sourceNotes: Aegina official bathing-profile cleanup 2026-05-29: official Kolona bathing profile supports identity, location near Aegina town, road access with stone stairs/paths in places, sand shore/seabed with rocky outcrops, normal depth with gentle seabed slope, a small partly organized section, nearby food/refreshment facilities, and coastal vegetation. Confidence promoted to medium; no wind, wave, or live-condition claim was added.

Next popular-area confidence pass 2026-06-02: official Kolona bathing-water profile supports high static metadata confidence for identity, location near Aegina town, road access with stone stairs/paths in places, sand shore/seabed with rocky outcrops, normal depth, a small partly organized section, nearby food/refreshment facilities and coastal vegetation. sourceNotes: Source-backed Aegina pass 2026-05-28: AllOverGreece lists Tourlos in Aegina as a sandy beach with very easy access, no organized status, no shade, and basic facilities including shower, changing room, and toilet. Confidence lifted to medium; coordinates, wind profile, and scoring were not changed.

Next popular-area confidence pass 2026-06-02: AllOverGreece directly supports Tourlos on Aegina as a sandy, very-easy-access, non-organized, no-shade, secluded beach with shower, changing room, and toilet; WeLoveAegina independently supports Tourlos identity/history and secluded beach context. Water depth was changed to medium because the reviewed sources do not document a deep-water claim. No windProfile, scoring, photos, or live calm/protected/safe claim was changed.

sourceNotes: Aegina official bathing-profile cleanup 2026-05-29: official West Souvala bathing profile supports same-area identity, road access and transport connection, sandy shore with sand/pebble seabed, shallow water with gentle seabed slope, unorganized status, nearby restaurants/refreshment facilities, settlement services, and parking activity around the pier/port area. Confidence promoted to medium; no wind, wave, or live-condition claim was added.

Popular confidence pass 2026-06-02 H: existing official or direct local beach sources support the recorded static identity, access, terrain, depth/service context for this record. Promoted to high for static beach facts only; windProfile, scoring, coordinates, photos, and live calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.

orientation.notes: Generated from Natural Earth geospatial exposure facingDeg. This records shoreline-facing direction only; it does not verify shelter, low-wave behavior, or live sea conditions.

sourceNotes: Seatrac Phase D2 pass-3 (2026-06): created from no-match seed "Αίγινα Μαραθώνας" (Aigina Marathonas), Aigina, Attica. Matched OSM natural=beach "Παραλία Μαραθώνα" near the locality centroid (name score 80). Slot via nearest existing beach #90 (157 m). Conservative — access/terrain unknown, amenities only as stated.
